texto: Most of these people are not going anywhere, and have nothing meaningful to do. They are zombies seeking purpose in an environment that cannot provide it. This is why, at the slightest public commotion, they quickly form their mobs, like a swarm of flies seeking shit on which to settle. But I did not come here to give a lecture. I came here to look for you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ben Hinson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Most of these people are not going anywhere, and have nothing meaningful to do. They are zombies …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, africa, cold-war pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de cold-war e historical-fiction.
